prompt: Create a photorealistic luxury wedding portrait of a cute British Shorthair cat as the groom, sitting upright on a garden aisle. The cat has plush gray tabby fur, round golden eyes, a small pink nose, alert ears, and a calm slightly curious expression while looking directly at the camera. Dress the cat in a formal white ruffled collar with a large ivory satin bow tie and one cream rose boutonniere pinned at the chest. Behind and slightly to the right, place a translucent white bridal veil standing upright like an invisible bride, edged with lace; on the veil area add a glowing white abstract Capafy-style logo made from one central diamond/star node connected to 6 round nodes. The setting is an elegant old European garden wedding venue: a stone path covered with pale rose petals, abundant pink, peach, and cream roses on both sides, classical stone statues and urns, an arched stone doorway in the background, tall trees and greenery forming a shaded canopy. Use warm golden-hour backlighting, soft bokeh, realistic fur detail, natural wedding-photography skin/fabric-style realism applied to cat fur and satin, shallow depth of field, cinematic romantic atmosphere, high-end editorial wedding photo look. Vertical 4:5 composition, cat centered slightly left, veil/logo centered right, foreground roses softly blurred, no text, no watermark, no humans.
